title: Job search profile
description: User-owned job-search preferences for sisyphus scraper and triage. No secrets or API keys.

fit_calibration_profile.description: Optional stem linking to fit/config/profiles/<stem>.json (stdlib calculator). Data-only pairing; JobSpy code must not import fit stack.

owner.description: Display name for logs and assessment headers (not used for auth).

remote_preference.description: Work-mode policy. fully_remote: US employee remote only; drop hybrid/onsite. hybrid_home_metro: remote US or hybrid/onsite only when JD/location hits home_metro.place_names (aligns with IL-12 L-0 for Atlanta-based searchers). any_us_remote: keep any listing that passes US-remote column checks; does not enforce home-metro hybrid allowlist (broader; may surface roles IL-12 would block for a fixed home metro).

home_metro.description: Anchor geography for hybrid/onsite exceptions when remote_preference is hybrid_home_metro.

zip_anchor.description: Five-digit US ZIP used as commute anchor (~25 road miles heuristic; place_names is the enforced allowlist).

place_names.description: Case-insensitive substring allowlist for hybrid/onsite JD or location text (city/neighborhood names).

comp.description: Compensation floors in USD. Scraper uses min_ceiling_usd; tier_floors override JFS/T-tier offer gates in manual review.

min_ceiling_usd.description: Minimum acceptable salary ceiling from JobSpy min_amount/max_amount (same as run_search_locally comp_ok threshold).

tier_floors.description: Optional per-tier offer floors (T5, T7, etc.) for post-triage manual gates; keys are tier numbers as strings.

ils.description: ILS (role-fit) triage floors. Conservative point estimate from triage_jobspy_csv; not a substitute for full ILS session.

cold_floor.description: Skip post-gate when ils_estimate is below this for cold-apply employers (default in toren: 45).

referral_warm_delta.description: Added to cold_floor for warm referral tier (LinkedIn connection at company).

referral_strong_delta.description: Added to cold_floor for strong referral tier (likely HM intro path).

tracks.description: Which scraper tracks to run (run_search_locally track letters).

enable.description: A=SDET/QA, B=AI IC, C=tech PM/TPM, G=Google Jobs, R=Remotive, GH=Greenhouse, L=Lever, AS=Ashby.

referrals.description: Per-company referral warmth for tiered ILS floors.

status_file.description: Path to referral_status.txt (company_substring,status lines: cold|warm|strong). Relative paths resolve from the profile file directory.

output.description: Where scraper and triage read/write CSV artifacts.

results_dir.description: Directory for jobspy_results_YYYYMMDD.csv and triage exports. Relative paths resolve from the profile file directory.
